mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_dictionary WHERE dict_type=#{type} AND dict_code=#{code}

where.if: AND (LOWER(dict_code) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) OR LOWER(dict_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')))

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_dictionary ORDER BY dict_type,sort_no,dict_code LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE data_dictionary SET dict_name=#{value.dictName},sort_no=#{value.sortNo},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dict_id=#{value.dictId} AND version=#{version}
UPDATE data_dictionary SET status=#{to},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dict_id=#{id} AND status=#{from} AND version=#{version}
